=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
New Charlotte Coliseum
Charlotte, North Carolina
17 September 1988

No info about lineage and taper.
Some digipops during "Absolutely Sweet Marie"  between 1.20-2.45 
Real good sound


1. Subterranean Homesick Blues, 2. Absolutely Sweet Marie, 3. John Brown, 4. Ballad Of A Thin Man, 5. Simple Twist Of Fate, 6. Highway 61 Revisited, 7. Mama, You Been On My Mind, 8. Girl From The North Country, 9. To Ramona, 10. I Shall Be Released 


11. Silvio, 12. Like A Rolling Stone, Encores, 13. Mr. Tambourine Man, 14. Barbara Allen, 15. Knockin' On Heaven's Door, 16. All Along The Watchtower 


Concert # 59 of The Never-Ending Tour.  Concert # 19 of the Interstate 88 Tour, part 2: Late Summer Tour of North America.
Concert # 59 with the first Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G. E. Smith (guitar), Kenny Aaronson (bass), Christopher Parker (drums).
7-9 and 13-14 Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G.E. Smith (guitar).
15  starts acoustic and ends electric.
1, 6  G. E. Smith (backup vocal).
6  G. E. Smith (electric slide guitar).

BobTalk:
Thank you. (after Silvio).
Thank you. (after All Along The Watchtower).
10 new songs (62%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tour
===================
